creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maintainer of net/rabbitmq,

Please note that PR #160027 has been submitted -- I have suggested that 
wait_for_pid// needs to be used in the rc script to overcome this 
problem; please test and submit a patch for this.

If you need any help, just ask and someone will help you.

Chris

--

dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.
